faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in College Point?
faqs.answer: Ant control services in College Point typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and type of ant species. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in College Point homes?
faqs.answer: College Point properties commonly experience carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. The waterfront location and older housing stock make carpenter ants particularly prevalent, as they nest in damp or damaged wood.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We'll provide specific safety instructions and can schedule treatments at times most convenient for your household.
